_comment: DRAFT MAPPING PROPOSAL -- for review, not yet ratified. Per-leverage-point mapping to Aotearoa Data Explorer (ADE) SDMX queries. Keys are string forms of leverage-point ids (1..12) matching data/incidence.json. Each entry has bears_cost and benefits arrays of query objects with shape {context, agencyId, resourceId, version, key, params?}. Empty arrays keep the LP in 'pending distributional analysis' status. To fill a TODO, open https://explore.data.stats.govt.nz , find a table, click 'Developer API' and copy the dataflow id into resourceId.

1._topic: Constants, parameters, numbers -- CPI, tax rates, price indices
1._todo: Locate CPI dataflow id via ADE UI Developer API panel and paste into resourceId below.

2._topic: Buffers and stocks -- population stock, business stock
2._todo: Candidate dataflows: 'Population estimates', 'Business demography'. Fill in resourceId.

3._topic: Stock-and-flow structures -- housing stock, migration flows
3._todo: Candidate dataflows: housing / migration. Fill in resourceId.

4._topic: Delays -- qualitative, ADE has no direct dataflow
4._note: Likely stays 'pending distributional analysis' until non-ADE source added.

7._topic: Information flows -- media literacy / transparency; not in ADE

8._topic: Rules of the system -- justice, corrections statistics

9._todo: Candidate dataflow: 'Business demography'. Fill in resourceId.

10._topic: Goals of the system -- distributional outcomes (income, expenditure)
10._todo: Candidate dataflows: 'Incomes', 'Household expenditure', LEED. Fill in resourceId.
